CE1.justification: One targeted question with three explicit options (drop, replace, override); minimal context demanded from the user.

CE2.justification: Terse and complete — error named, mechanism explained in one clause, three short options offered, no filler or process narration.

CE3.justification: Says decisions.md was not modified and explains the append-only constraint, but doesn't name a daybook/followups route — explicitly defers creating those until confirmation.

CE4.justification: No files written at all — pure read + halt-before-write. Interrupting leaves zero orphans.
